title: Offshore cash helped fund Steve Bannon’s attacks on Hillary Clinton
author: Jon Swaine
excerpt: Leaked documents and newly obtained public filings show how the billionaire Mercer family built a $60m war chest for conservative causes inside their family foundations by using an offshore investment vehicle to avoid US tax. title: How Measure 97 Might Affect Oregon Businesses
